song.title: As the Deer
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) As the deer panteth for the water, So my soul longeth after You. You alone are my heart’s desire And I long to worship You.
[V2] 2) You’re my friend and You are my brother Even though You are a King. I love You more than any other, So much more than anything.
[C] Chorus You alone are my strength, My shield; To You alone may my spirit yield. You alone are my heart`s desire And I long to worship You.
[V3] 3) I want You more than gold or silver, Only You can satisfy. You alone are the real joy giver And the apple of my eye.
song.author: Martin J. Nystrom
